name: hardware-probe
description: Expert system hardware probe and performance diagnostic engine. Beyond simple inventory, it provides real-time monitoring of CPU/RAM load, detects thermal throttling, and analyzes GPU capabilities (VRAM, Bandwidth) for AI workloads. It offers actionable troubleshooting for system slowness and expert recommendations for local LLM optimization (Ollama, CUDA, Metal).
author: Yamaru Project <contact@yamaru.eu>
